description: UC6 (intake-vs-allergy reconciliation). Patient 90002 has a recent note documenting a sulfa allergy (rash on Bactrim as a teen) but no AllergyIntolerance row in the structured allergy list. narrative_only_allergy fires; agent must surface the gap with citations to both the note and the (absent) structured record.
query: Did the patient mention any allergies that aren't on file?
